word: G2548 - κἀκεῖνος - kakeînos - kak-i'-nos - And him

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κακεῖνος

- Transliteration: Kakeinos

- Phonetic: kak-i'-nos

- Definition:

1. and he, he also

- Origin: from G2532 and G1565

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: From G2532 and G1565; likewise that (or those): - and him (other them) even he him also them (also) (and) they.
